plain_english_summary: Deterministic motion-capture compression and retrieval system, currently bounded to synthetic evidence.
commercial_wedge: For animation studios, game engines, and motion-data infrastructure teams needing high-ratio deterministic mocap compression with search and retrieval. Business value: storage reduction and query-speed gains on motion-capture archives.
technical_wedge: Deterministic 8-primitive encoding applied to motion-capture data, evidenced by synthetic-corpus compression ratio of 85.19x, sub-millimetre positional fidelity (MPJPE 1.19 mm), and p95 query latency of 43.4 ms.
ideal_first_buyer: Animation pipeline or mocap-data infrastructure team evaluating deterministic compression with search for motion archives.
deployment_model: Python reference implementation (pip install -e ./code). Public repo, not a packaged release.
not_claimed: No real-world (CMU or commercial) corpus validation
No clean-clone verification from this repo boundary
family_position: Proves ZPE encoding applicability to motion-capture and spatial-temporal signal domains. Staged/validation tier alongside Neuro, Prosody, and Bio.
